evidence: Great rendition of a wonderful story, our family enjoyed this very much.
This story inspired my daughter to become a nurse.
We thought each actor did a superb job in their part, and made this our very favorite Cinderella story!
A true story about a father finding a cure for his son when all else fails...a really great movie.
I love the way he acknowledges when he 'hurts her,' without defensiveness, without argument.
This is the kind of story every American needs to know about, in order that it NEVER happen again.
Jodie Foster, Anthony Hopkins and Ted Levine (Monk) do a superb job of making this movie creepy.
Holly Hunter and John Goodman at their best.
Meryl Streep does an excellent job, of course.
Susan Sarandon and Nick Nolte are sublime.
It's a great way to introduce a child to great music without them even realizing it!
This story inspired my daughter to become a nurse.

summary: The user enjoys family-friendly dramas with simple narratives and a strong emotional impact. They appreciate high production quality and have a fondness for notable actors, indicating a preference for engaging and meaningful stories.
